dashboards_data.name: CORTEX - [AWS VPC Network Flows Analysis]
dashboards_data.description: Cloud VPCflow log analysis built on raw cloud audit logs (Cloud Flow Log filter). Covers AWS VPC Flow Logs (amazon_aws_raw) and Azure NSG Flow Logs (msft_azure_raw) with GCP placeholder. Includes traffic volume, byte-level analysis, TCP flags, ACCEPT/REJECT breakdown, IMDS detection, geo-location, and full flow detail tables.  replaces network_story preset which lacked volume data and included rejected connections.

data.phrase:
dataset = amazon_aws_raw
| filter (_log_type = "Cloud Flow Log")
| filter action in ($action)
| filter region in ($region)
| alter proto_name = if(
    protocol = 6,   "TCP",
    protocol = 17,  "UDP",
    protocol = 1,   "ICMP",
    protocol = 41,  "IPv6-Encap",
    protocol = 47,  "GRE",
    protocol = 4,   "IP-in-IP",
    protocol = 132, "SCTP",
    protocol = 8,   "EGP",
    protocol = 50,  "ESP",
    protocol = 51,  "AH",
    protocol = 89,  "OSPF",
    protocol = 112, "VRRP",
    protocol = 58,  "ICMPv6",
    concat("Proto-", to_string(protocol)))
| filter proto_name in ($protocol)
| alter src_ip = coalesce(pkt_srcaddr, srcaddr)
| alter dst_ip = coalesce(pkt_dstaddr, dstaddr)
| filter src_ip in ($src_ip)
| filter dst_ip in ($dst_ip)
| alter dstport_str = to_string(dstport)
| filter dstport_str in ($dstport)
| filter vpc_id in ($filter_vpc)
| alter flag_label = if(
    tcp_flags = 0,  "No Flags",
    tcp_flags = 1,  "FIN",
    tcp_flags = 2,  "SYN",
    tcp_flags = 3,  "FIN+SYN",
    tcp_flags = 4,  "RST",
    tcp_flags = 5,  "FIN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 6,  "SYN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 7,  "FIN+SYN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 16, "ACK",
    tcp_flags = 17, "FIN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 18, "SYN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 19, "FIN+SYN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 20, "RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 22, "SYN+RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 23, "FIN+SYN+RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 24, "PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 25, "FIN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 26, "SYN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 27, "FIN+SYN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 28, "RST+PSH+ACK",
    to_string(tcp_flags))
| filter flag_label in ($flag_label)
| filter region not in (null, "")
| alter total_bytes = to_number(bytes)
| filter total_bytes >= to_number($min_bytes)
| comp sum(total_bytes) as Total_Bytes, count() as Flows by region
| sort desc Total_Bytes
| limit 20
| view graph type = pie subtype = full xaxis = region yaxis = Total_Bytes

| filter vpc_id in ($filter_vpc)
| alter flag_label = if(
    tcp_flags = 0,  "No Flags",
    tcp_flags = 1,  "FIN",
    tcp_flags = 2,  "SYN",
    tcp_flags = 3,  "FIN+SYN",
    tcp_flags = 4,  "RST",
    tcp_flags = 5,  "FIN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 6,  "SYN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 7,  "FIN+SYN+RST",
    tcp_flags = 16, "ACK",
    tcp_flags = 17, "FIN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 18, "SYN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 19, "FIN+SYN+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 20, "RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 22, "SYN+RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 23, "FIN+SYN+RST+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 24, "PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 25, "FIN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 26, "SYN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 27, "FIN+SYN+PSH+ACK",
    tcp_flags = 28, "RST+PSH+ACK",
    to_string(tcp_flags))
| filter flag_label in ($flag_label)
| alter total_bytes = to_number(bytes)
| filter total_bytes >= to_number($min_bytes)
| filter dst_ip not in (null, "")
| comp sum(to_number(bytes)) as Total_Bytes, count() as Flows by dst_ip
| sort desc Total_Bytes
| limit 20
| view graph type = column subtype = grouped layout = horizontal xaxis = dst_ip yaxis = Total_Bytes
